title: Mach30WP
shortDescription: Hi-Viz Cut5 Mechanical glove. Multi function. Impact resistant
description: Hi-Viz Cut5 Mechanical glove. Multi function. Impact resistant

features: Latex foam reinforced multi-colour TPR back of hand impact protection
attributes.composition: Black leatherette palm with silicon checker-plate finish; Black sand finish palm and thumb crotch area.; Double stitched; Kevlar fabric patch inside the palm; Finger tipped and knuckle impact resistant TPR multi-colour ribs; Back of hand impact resistant TPR multi-colour pads; Foam coated back of hand; 60mm neoprene cuff; 4mm soft plastic continuous pull with hanging loop and glove info
